# gethookd labs

open source ad research tools by [gethookd.ai](https://gethookd.ai).

we index 6M+ proven ecommerce ads across 15+ niches. this org ships the agent tools that put that database in your terminal and inside claude / cursor / hermes.

## projects

- [**gethookd-agent**](https://github.com/gethookd-labs/gethookd-agent) — mine 6M+ ads → viral swipe file in 90 seconds
- more coming soon (hook generator, thumbnail scorer, ad-script writer)
